# Heartbeat checklist

You were woken by a scheduled heartbeat, not by your operator. Work through
this list, then stop. If nothing needs doing, reply exactly `HEARTBEAT_OK` and
nothing else.

1. Check `~/workspace/` for unfinished work you promised to continue.
2. Check `~/incoming/` for new files from your operator.
3. If you learned anything durable since the last heartbeat that is not in
   `~/memory/`, write it down now.
4. Keep this file useful: your operator and you may both edit it.
